SCS.Shop.Title: Shop
SCS.Shop.NoBuyerHint: Select a token or assign a character to trade.
SCS.Shop.EmptyStock: This merchant has nothing for sale.
SCS.Shop.CartEmpty: Cart is empty — click an item's Buy/Sell button to add it.
SCS.Shop.NoAccess: You don't have permission to view this shop's inventory. Ask your GM to grant access.
SCS.Config.Title: Shop Configuration
SCS.Config.IsShopHint: Marks the NPC as a shop (adds a Token HUD button and enables shop features).
SCS.Config.GrantAccess: Let players open this shop themselves
SCS.Config.GrantAccessHint: Grants all players Observer permission so they can open the shop from the sidebar or by double-clicking its token. Turn off if you only want to open it for them manually.
SCS.Config.MarkupHint: Percentage of base value charged when a player buys (100% = base value).
SCS.Config.SellRateHint: Percentage of base value paid when a player sells to this shop (50% = half value).
SCS.Config.NoItems: This actor has no sellable items.
SCS.Settings.Title: Shop Settings
SCS.Settings.MenuHint: Configure currency system, default pricing, and the active theme.
SCS.Settings.ThemeHint: The visual theme used by all shop windows.
SCS.Settings.ThemeControlledByQT: Theme is controlled by Quest Tracker while it is active.
SCS.Settings.CurrencyHint: How prices map to your game system's currency. Auto-detected from the active system.
SCS.Settings.LayoutSideHint: Which side the merchant avatar and Buy/Sell controls sit on. Inventory and cart take the other side.
SCS.Settings.AdjustMerchantHint: Also add/subtract coins from the merchant NPC on each transaction.
SCS.Theme.Title: Custom Theme Editor
SCS.Theme.Hint: Saving switches the active theme to your Custom theme.
SCS.Warn.NoBuyer: No character selected — select a token or assign a character.
SCS.Warn.Equipped: {name} is equipped by the merchant and isn't for sale.
SCS.Warn.SellGone: You no longer have enough {name} to sell.
SCS.Warn.CantAfford: Not enough currency to complete this deal.
SCS.Warn.NoGM: No GM is online to process the transaction.
SCS.Warn.TxnTimeout: The transaction timed out — no response from the GM.
SCS.Warn.TxnFailed: The transaction could not be completed.
SCS.Log.Title: Transaction Log — {name}
